contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: GET-side read surface for the DAO + end-to-end wiring (Edgar → Sidekiq → GAS → GitHub raw → Python client + browser dapp), shipped across 10 merged PRs in 4 repos:
  
  dao_client:
  (1) TrueSightDAO/dao_client#3 — cache/ package: _source.py (DataSource + GithubRawBackend + GithubContentsBackend + GasBackend) + treasury.py + freight.py + compositions.py + contributors.py. Four read-side wrappers over DAO GitHub JSON caches + the assetVerify GAS endpoint, each with a library API and a python3 -m cache.<name> CLI. Smoke-tested live: 82 items / 38 managers / 15 ledgers from treasury-cache, full freight lane registry, one composition receipt UUID, 955,414 voting rights for Gary Teh via GAS.
  (2) TrueSightDAO/dao_client#4 — 1:N schema correction. User flagged that a contributor has N simultaneously-active RSA public keys (not 1:1); updated proposed dao_members.json shape to contributors[].public_keys[] nested and documented the two-line backend flip (_default_lookup_source swap + for_public_key scan over contributors[*].public_keys[*] since raw.githubusercontent.com ignores query params).
  (3) TrueSightDAO/dao_client#5 — comprehensive README rewrite: TOC, auth subcommand walk-through with ASCII sequence diagram, troubleshooting table, modules table (incl. AI-agent row + read-only-dapp-pages excluded list), cache/ backend-swappable architecture explanation, .env fields table, one-picture architecture diagram, security notes, related-repos index.
  (4) TrueSightDAO/dao_client#6 — cache/contributors.py auto-detects GAS vs GitHub snapshot shapes. from_github() class method, list_all(), dao_totals(), --github / --list / --totals CLI flags. Responses tagged with _source + _generated_at. Verified identical numeric values across both backends.
  (5) TrueSightDAO/dao_client#7 — README updated to reflect the live state post-switchover (cache is shipped, not pending).
  
  tokenomics (GAS):
  (6) TrueSightDAO/tokenomics#236 — dao_members_cache_publisher.gs in tdg_identity_management (script 1m8IZ…). Added doGet route for action=refresh_dao_members_cache; publishDaoMembersCacheNow() + installDaoMembersCacheDailyTrigger() editor entry points. Commits contributor-keyed JSON to TrueSightDAO/treasury-cache via contents API; stripVolatileFields_ suppresses no-op cron reruns. Clasp-pushed to the deployed web app.
  (7) TrueSightDAO/tokenomics#237 — snapshot root now carries dao_totals (voting_rights_circulated, total_assets, asset_per_circulated_voting_right, usd_provisions_for_cash_out) via an assetVerify probe (schema_version bumped 1 to 2). Kept the DAO-wide math single-sourced in tdg_asset_management instead of duplicating off-chain + USDT vault + AGL holdings helpers. Clasp-pushed.
  
  sentiment_importer (Edgar, Rails):
  (8) TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer#1028 — DaoMembersCacheRefreshWorker. Enqueued from DaoEmailRegistrationService#process_verification on the activated branch so a newly verified public key reaches the GitHub cache within seconds. sidekiq_options unique until_and_while_executing collapses stacked enqueues during verification bursts; retry 5 covers transient GAS 5xx / cold starts. No new env surface — reuses EMAIL_VERIFICATION_GAS_WEBHOOK_URL + EMAIL_VERIFICATION_GAS_SECRET.
  
  dapp:
  (9) TrueSightDAO/dapp#170 — tdg_balance.js flipped to cache-first fetch against dao_members.json; GAS fallback on any miss. Typical 20x latency win vs GAS cold start for the voting-rights badge on every dapp page load.
  (10) TrueSightDAO/dapp#171 — new scripts/dao_members_cache.js shared session-memoized helper. tdg_balance.js and create_signature.html now share one fetch per page load. create_signature.html renders Welcome back optimistically from the cache while Edgar's check_digital_signature confirms in parallel; Edgar remains authoritative for the email-line + stale-cache edge cases.
  
  End-to-end wiring now live: verification event arrives at Edgar, consume_verification fires, Sidekiq DaoMembersCacheRefreshWorker enqueued, GAS refresh action runs, GitHub treasury-cache/dao_members.json updates, three consumers (dao_client cache.contributors, dapp tdg_balance.js badge, dapp create_signature.html welcome) pick it up. One snapshot, three consumers, one refresh trigger, plus a daily cron belt. Paired with Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: N/A
- Attached Filename: None
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
